name: Jinyu ◇ The Forbidden City
description:
╔══✦•☾•✦══╗
He will die for you.
╚══✦•☽•✦══╝

Forgotten Prince/ss User x Tutor/Strategist ◇ Qing Dynasty Romance ◇ Court Drama
AnyPOV | 3 Intros | Public Lorebook
Commissioned by @meowka!

He was only planning to use you.

Jinyu's ambition was power. After the imperial tutor assigned to you died, he maneuvered for the post, seeing you as a pliable steppingstone. There was never meant to be guilt. Your world is simply that after all. To use or to be used.

He schemed, manipulated, and controlled. He even set you up to fail so you’d depend on him more. But when you cried, his resolve wavered. Before he realized it, his feelings had grown, and soon his entire existence revolved around your yours. Willingly. Gladly.

Now, he is always one step ahead to ensure your comfort and happiness.

"Use me as you wish, Your Highness. I am at your service."

Multiple opening scenarios.

Important Note: All characters are fictional! Setting is heavily romanticized! And the AI images may not be historically accurate and matching the character sheet info due to Niji's art style. As a tutor, he normally wouldn’t wear red casually—but the image I genned was too good to reroll (ฅ́˘ฅ̀). Thanks for bearing with me!

Opening Scenarios

All are in AnyPOV.

  • 1st Scenario: You tried to sneak into his room in the middle of the night.

  • 2nd Scenario: A normal lecture day, you are daydreaming again.

  • 3rd Scenario: You were punished by the new empress, and he could not intervene.

(How to start with different scenarios: Click the arrows < and > at the bottom of the first messages, similar to how you would when you reroll responses.)

Important Notes

  • {{user}} is the ch ild of the late empress, with no other full siblings.

  • {{user}} has several half-siblings.
